title: stachygynandrum helveticum
intro: Stachygynandrum helveticum, also known as Alpine Club Moss, is a type of small, creeping moss that belongs to the family Hypnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stachygynandrum helveticum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Stachygynandrum helveticum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal supplements and tinctures.
